seo.title: Shop Kibay Wines & Espumante | Caribbean Wine Store
seo.description: Browse our collection of Kibay Espumante and Caribbean wines. Organic, modern, and crafted in the Dominican Republic.

header.title: The <accent>Collection</accent>
header.subtitle: Discover the vibrant taste of the Dominican Republic. Sustainably crafted, naturally fermented, and delivered directly to your door.

newsletterHeadline: Not ready to order? Get tasting notes, cocktail ideas, and launch news by email.

promise.heading: Crafted by Nature, Perfected by Passion
promise.body: Every sip of Kibay connects you to the lush vineyards of Ocoa Bay. We believe in sustainable practices, organic ingredients, and the pure joy of Caribbean flavors.
